titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/276

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=250 status=live modified=2017-03-14 19:36:40.810026+00 | translation moa=251 status=live modified=2017-03-14 19:36:44.398406+00

p.cl: Edgarus filius dofnaldi omnibus in Christo fidelibus tam presentibus  quam futuris eternam in domino salutem.

Nouerit uniuersitas uestra me dedisse ⁊ concessisse ⁊ hac presenti carta mea confirmasse Gilleberto
nepoti meo ecclesiam sancti micaelis de dalgarnoc in liberam ⁊ puram quietam ⁊ perpetuam elemosinam
cum terris ⁊ capellis cum decimis ⁊ oblationibus cum obuentionibus ⁊ ceteris omnibus ad eandem ecclesiam pertinen
tibus. Tenendam de me ⁊ heredibus meis adeo libere ⁊ quiete pure ⁊ perpetue plenarie ⁊ honorifice . sicut
aliis in episcopatu Glasgcuensi liberius ⁊ quietius plenarius ⁊ honorificencius aliquam ecclesiam tenet ⁊
possidet.

Testibus hiis  Waltero de Wellam . Radulfo decano de dumfres . Ada filio hawis Gille
coneill filio meo dofnaldo filio meo . Matheo clerico Gillecrist iudice . patin mac gillenef . Aliuegan capellano de Killosbern . Murchereach presbitero S. Carpre de Dunescor .
Edgar son of Donald, to all the faithful in Christ both present and to come, wishes eternal salvation in the Lord:

You should all know that I have given, and granted, and by this present charter made firm, to Gilbert my nephew, the church of St Michael in Dalgarnock, in free and pure, quiet and perpetual alms, with lands and chapels, with teinds and oblations, with obventions and all the rest pertaining to the same church. To be held of me and my heirs as freely and quietly, purely and perpetually, fully and honourably, as other in the bishopric of Glasgow hold and possess any church freely and quietly, fully and honourably.

With these witnesses, Walter de Wellam, Ralph, dean of Dumfries, Adam son of Hawise, Gilla Conaill my son, Donald my son, Matthew the clerk, Gilchrist the judex, Patrick mac Gilla na Náem, Aliugan, chaplain of Closeburn, Muirchertach, priest of St Cairpre of Dunscore.
